headline: Assessing Extendicare (TSX:EXE) Valuation After Acquisition, Dividend Hike And Strong Q4 Results
summary: Extendicare (TSX:EXE) has been in focus after closing a $570 million acquisition of CBI Health, posting above-consensus Q4 results, raising its dividend, and receiving a BBB credit rating from DBRS. See our latest analysis for Extendicare. At a share price of CA$27.76, the stock has logged a 31.69% 90 day share price return and a very large 3 year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has been building as investors react to the CBI Health acquisition, a higher dividend, and the...
